form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track beaten 17 m by Punisher Eleven (1:55.30) in NW1PMCD on April 7 at $20.30. At the start before 5th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track beaten 19 m by Widger Boys (1:57.10) in NW1PMCD on April 1 at $22.30. Worth consideration.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Punisher Eleven, a rival who he faces again; when 90 metres ninth at this track over 1609m in a NW1PMCD race on April 7. Can't have on that basis.

form.formComment: Last start a big 11 m win as favourite (Fr4) at this track (1:55.30) beating Gorgeous Jet in NW1PMCD on April 7 at $1.50. No surprise if he made it two in a row.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Lenny Hill at Pocono Downs over 1609m in a NW1PM?CG on March 10 at $23.80. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Punisher Eleven at this track over 1609m in a NW1PMCD on April 7 at $7.60. Strong winning prospects.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track beaten 9 m by I Am The Sea (1:56.40) in NW1PMCD on April 8 at $13.70. form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr3) over 1609m at this track beaten 11 m by Punisher Eleven (1:55.30) in NW1PMCD on April 7 at $5. Great chance to register his first win.

form.formComment: Lines up again after a break of five-and-a-half months. Well beaten at the end of his last preparation at this course and distance when seventh unwanted in the market behind Stage Dancer. Hard to see him in the placings.

form.formComment: Lines up again after a break of seven months. Well beaten at the end of his last preparation when eighth at very long odds behind Joining Forces. Happy to look elsewhere.
